documented_expected_behaviour: Probe target audience, brand and channel, ideation versus execution, portfolio evidence, visual/copy/video responsibilities, production tools, creative approval process, speed and volume, response to feedback, and commercial performance measures.
initial_manager_statement: We're hiring a Brand Designer to work on packaging and campaign visuals across our Toys and Edge brands.

turns.manager_message: We're hiring a Brand Designer to work on packaging and campaign visuals across our Toys and Edge brands.

next_question.question: What specific design deliverables and responsibilities will the Brand Designer own for packaging and campaign visuals?

turns.manager_message: Mainly packaging artwork for new toy lines and social/digital campaign visuals - banners, product shots, and some video thumbnails.

next_question.question: Which social or digital platforms will the campaign assets primarily support?

turns.manager_message: Instagram, TikTok, and our retail partner portals. I review and approve every asset before it goes out.

next_question.question: Will the Brand Designer create and adapt assets for Instagram, TikTok, and retail partner portals, or only prepare them for delivery?

rejected_turns.note: Same must-have/ambiguity overlap guard, on a compound platform+approval-process answer. Passed on retry. See docs/DECISIONS_AND_LESSONS.md, 2026-07-24.
rejected_turns.manager_message: Instagram, TikTok, and our retail partner portals. I review and approve every asset before it goes out.

basic_info.title: Brand Designer
basic_info.initial_manager_statement: We're hiring a Brand Designer to work on packaging and campaign visuals across our Toys and Edge brands.

requirements.name: Packaging and campaign visual design
requirements.description: Design work covering packaging and campaign visuals.
requirements.business_rationale: The manager explicitly states the role will work on both packaging and campaign visuals.
requirements.source_statement: We're hiring a Brand Designer to work on packaging and campaign visuals across our Toys and Edge brands.

requirements.name: Toys and Edge brand work
requirements.description: Work across the Toys and Edge brands.
requirements.business_rationale: The manager explicitly identifies Toys and Edge as the brands within the role's scope.
requirements.source_statement: We're hiring a Brand Designer to work on packaging and campaign visuals across our Toys and Edge brands.

requirements.name: Social and digital campaign visual assets
requirements.description: Create banners, product shots, and some video thumbnails for social/digital campaign visuals.
requirements.business_rationale: The manager identifies these asset types as part of the social/digital campaign visual work, but qualifies video thumbnails with “some.”
requirements.source_statement: Mainly packaging artwork for new toy lines and social/digital campaign visuals - banners, product shots, and some video thumbnails.

requirements.name: Instagram, TikTok, and retail partner portal assets
requirements.description: Create or support visual assets for Instagram, TikTok, and retail partner portals.
requirements.business_rationale: The manager identifies these channels as destinations for assets, but does not explicitly state the candidate's exact responsibilities for each channel.
requirements.source_statement: Instagram, TikTok, and our retail partner portals. I review and approve every asset before it goes out.

open_assumptions.statement: The manager is involved in final asset approval before publication or distribution.
open_assumptions.source_statement: I review and approve every asset before it goes out.

open_ambiguities.description: Clarify whether the Brand Designer is expected to create assets for all three named channels, adapt existing assets for them, or only coordinate their delivery.
open_ambiguities.source_statement: Instagram, TikTok, and our retail partner portals. I review and approve every asset before it goes out.
open_ambiguities.why_confirmation_is_needed: The message names channels but does not state the designer's specific responsibility or scope across them.

blockers: At least one success outcome is required.
At least one responsibility is required.
At least one assessment method is required.
A human decision owner is required.
